notes: BGC Bus operated by Bonifacio Transport Corporation (Ayala Corp subsidiary). Private estate transport — NOT LTFRB franchised. Cashless (Beep Card/GCash). Main terminals: EDSA Ayala (McKinley Exchange Corporate Center, corner EDSA & McKinley Road, Makati) and Market! Market! Mall (C-5 side, Taguig). Fares updated Jan 1 2025. GPS stop coordinates not publicly available.

routes.origin: EDSA Ayala Terminal (McKinley Exchange Corporate Center, Makati)
routes.frequency_notes: Frequent (no headway data available); operates Mon-Sun 6:00AM-10:00PM
routes.notes: Point-to-point express, no intermediate stops. Only BGC Bus route operating on weekends. As of 2025 no longer stops at BGC Arts Center. Bidirectional.

routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri 6:00AM-10:00PM; ~12 min trip time; 8 stops (Moovit); no headway data
routes.notes: Circular/loop route starting and ending at EDSA Ayala. Serves north BGC (Uptown corridor). Does NOT stop at The Fort Strip/RCBC. Distinct from older 'North Route' (10 stops from North Station) — may be renamed/consolidated version.

routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri 6:00AM-10:00AM and 5:00PM-10:00PM (peak hours only per most sources)
routes.notes: Fastest access to Bonifacio Stopover and Crescent Park West via Buendia Ave / Kalayaan Flyover. Peak hours only service. 3 stops only.

routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri 6:00AM-10:00AM and 5:00PM-10:00PM (peak hours per most sources)
routes.notes: West BGC via McKinley Road corridor. Serves RCBC/Piccadilly Star and Fort Victoria residential. Peak hours only.

routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri 6:00AM-10:00PM; no headway data; sources note slow during peak (walking faster)
routes.notes: Circular within BGC interior. 8 named stopovers. Only route serving University Parkway from Market! Market!. BGC official website confirms Central Route page exists but content unextractable.
Widest geographic coverage within BGC. Serves BPO/hospitality workers on late shifts. Frequency confirmed at 30-min headways — only BGC Bus route with confirmed headway data.

routes.frequency_notes: Sat-Sun 6:00AM-10:00PM; same stops as Night Route; headway unknown
routes.notes: Daytime weekend service using the same wider stop pattern as the Night Route.
Higher fare (₱25) reflects longer distance. Peak hours only. Connects Arca South development (near C6/Bayshore) to central BGC.

routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri only; Nuvali→BGC: one trip at 6:30AM; BGC→Nuvali: two trips at 6:30PM and 7:15PM
routes.notes: Premium long-haul express crossing NCR-Laguna boundary. Very limited frequency (essentially 1 AM + 2 PM trips per day). Fare ₱90 regular, ₱72 PWD/senior. Not LTFRB-regulated as standard PUV.
Serves Ayala Avenue CBD corridor (Makati) — does NOT enter BGC. Functions as a Makati CBD micro-circulator. 10 stops.

routes.route_name: BGC Bus LRT-Ayala Route (LRT Buendia Route)
key_stops: Arellano University - Jose Abad Santos Campus (Pasay)
routes.frequency_notes: Mon-Fri; specific hours not confirmed from available sources
routes.notes: Least documented BGC Bus route. Provides intermodal LRT-1 connection into BGC from Pasay. Stops within BGC proper not confirmed. Only one source (taguigeno.com Jan 2025) provides stop-level detail.
